scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install n8n-workflow-designer\\n  or /plugin install n8n-workflow-designer@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
